ar.goals.buddy_explainer.body: A buddy is another member who chooses to support a public goal. They can see your updates, notice when progress stalls, and offer encouragement without taking over the goal.
ar.goals.buddy_explainer.how: Make a goal public if you want support. Use Discover to become a buddy for someone else, or Goal Buddies to follow goals you are helping with.
ar.goals.buddy_explainer.title: Goal buddies keep people moving
ar.goals.detail.no_buddy: No buddy yet. Public goals can be picked up from Discover by another member.
ar.goals.detail.progress_explainer: Progress is calculated from the current value against the target. Check-ins can update this percentage directly.
ar.goals.empty_buddying_description: You're not a buddy for any goals yet. Check the Discover tab to find goals to support!

ar.goals.empty_my_description: Create your first goal to start tracking progress
ar.goals.guide.checkins_body: Record where the goal stands, how it feels, and any useful context for you or your buddy.
ar.goals.guide.progress_body: The percentage is your latest estimate against the target value. Check-ins now update the goal and timeline.
